summary:
Teleoncology supports safe chemotherapy delivery by enabling virtual consultations and coordinated management of percutaneous vascular access procedures. This model maintains treatment efficacy and patient safety even in resource-limited rural settings where direct specialist oversight might otherwise be lacking.
